content_body: its hard to add anything new to what has been said so many times about this wonderful cabin! It really is so beautiful and relaxing. We especially enjoyed the fireplace on the deck, and waking up to such an amazing view! A perfect getaway for my Me, my husband, sister, and her husband. Blue Ridge is an absolute delight and this cabin is a treasure! We have loved every minute of it! Thank you!!!
title: Blue Ridge is an absolute delight and this cabin is a treasure!
